def positive_helper_returns_success_shape_even_when_substeps_partially_fail():
    rule_id = "helper_returns_success_shape_even_when_substeps_partially_fail"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag helpers that claim success while hiding partial failures."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
